name: 更好的故障机器人 / Better Defect
author: Codex
description: v103/vPC compatible full build: restores 26 old Defect cards, keeps cross-run strict zero-sum rarity-local dynamic odds and per-card disabled-state persistence, fixes Fission orb visuals, restores the starter Strike -> Ball Lightning replacement, no BaseLib. Encyclopedia-only card disabling and 14 historical card-version upgrades share a persistent 35-point budget. v0.8.2 retains the v0.8.1 description/effect consistency fixes and skips the unsafe Android NCard.Model setter detour that could crash during mod startup; PC keeps the setter hook.
